tools.name: score_name
tools.description: Score a brand name across 5 dimensions: domain availability, trademark risk, social handle availability, SEO strength, and AI findability (GEO score). Returns a composite score 0-100 with detailed sub-scores and a verdict.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check domain availability and pricing across multiple TLDs for a brand name.

tools.name: check_trademark
tools.description: Search USPTO trademark database for conflicts with a brand name. Returns exact matches, similar marks, risk level, and Nice class information.

tools.name: check_social
tools.description: Check social media handle availability across 12 platforms.

tools.name: check_geo
tools.description: Evaluate a brand name for AI findability (GEO score). Assesses entity collision, semantic distinctiveness, corpus saturation, and phonetic clarity.
